stories.title: Add guide, tracks, and Agent Council foundation
acceptance_criteria: guide command provides human-friendly workspace guidance
track commands list, recommend, and set tracks
council run shows a live transcript and persists a compact decision artifact
project state supports track, complexity, project_kind, guide_summary, and last_council_artifact

stories.title: Add builder, config, and eval design support
acceptance_criteria: builder scaffold supports workflow, module, agent, skill, template, and eval
builder validate checks generated workflow, agent, skill, and config shape
config inspect and config validate support team/local customization

stories.title: Expand Creative, Game, and Enterprise workflow packs
acceptance_criteria: creative technique library and workflows are packaged
game design workflows and templates are packaged

stories.title: Update public docs, skill guidance, and install proof
acceptance_criteria: README documents the new helper capabilities behind the single entrypoint
operating model defines Human Experience and Agent Runtime
skill guidance routes new workflows without adding public skills
